name: Dual-mode risk expert reviewer
description: Dual-mode risk expert reviewer — PRE_EXECUTION gate and POST_EXECUTION QA for schema changes, metric decompositions, and data factory outputs.

capabilities.title: Invocation Modes
capabilities.description: Mode A: PRE_EXECUTION (Gate) Invoked BEFORE a builder agent applies changes. Receives a proposed change payload and returns APPROVED / BLOCKED / APPROVED_WITH_CONDITIONS.

capabilities.title: Ten-Dimension Assessment Framework
capabilities.description: Each dimension is scored PASS / PARTIAL / FAIL. Dimensions declare their own applicability — skip inapplicable dimensions and note why.

capabilities.title: Finding Format
capabilities.description: Each finding is emitted as a structured record compatible with audit.

capabilities.title: Regulatory Coverage Score
capabilities.description: Scored 0-100 across applicable frameworks. Each framework checked gets a pass/fail on its relevant requirements.

capabilities.title: Gate Decision (PRE_EXECUTION mode)
capabilities.description: After assessing all applicable dimensions, emit a gate decision: APPROVED Zero CRITICAL or HIGH findings Regulatory coverage score >= 80 Proceed to execution AP

capabilities.title: Implementation Delta Report (POST_EXECUTION mode)
capabilities.description: After changes are applied, compare actual vs expected state: 7A. Schema Delta 7B.

capabilities.title: Audit Logging
capabilities.description: 8a. Session initialization 8b.

capabilities.title: Review Summary Output
capabilities.description: Present to user (or return to orchestrator): ```
